name: xcpSendRaw
title: xcpSendRaw
syntax: void OnXcpSendRaw(char ecuQualifier[], byte data[], long dataSize);
description: Sends any data as control command to an XCP/CCP device. The first data byte defines the control command code.
The callback is called with the response to a raw XCP command sent by xcpSendRaw.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Name of the device, configured within the CANoeXCP/CCP Window.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Byte array of the data to be sent.

parameters.name: dataSize
parameters.description: Length of the data to be sent.

parameters.name: expectResponse
parameters.description: 0: The XCP slave will not respond to this command 1: The XCP slave is expected to respond to this command and the callback will be called

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
